{"abstract":"【成长型主角】+【无系统】+【不无敌】+【纯西游】
+【无洪荒！！！无封神演义！！！】
大家好，我是林宇，我穿越了。
好消息：刚落地就继承万两黄金，直接实现财富自由！
坏消息：穿越到西游记里了，身为凡人的我，在妖怪眼里就是一盘菜！
你是说一拳干爆一栋楼的那个妖精，名叫小钻风！？你管这叫巡山小妖？？？
不行，不能再躺平了，修仙！必须立刻修仙！！！
可我穿越前就是一普通高中生啊。
但是，一只饥饿的猴子引起了我的注意……
于是——
“猴哥！吃！管饱！还有信我，以后绝对不跟老和尚打赌！”
“卷帘！你给我离那琉璃盏远点！”
“天蓬啊！快把这碗醒酒汤干了，月宫去不得！”
取经？谁爱去谁去，兄弟们，跟我回水帘洞，逍遥自在吃酒去也！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/3035135bccd4fb94934cea94127b8f7f","author":"瓛屿","author_id":"","book_id":"7551137058652179481","book_name":"西游开局喂猴，带飞悟空逆天改命","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#481808","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"7350人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1140,"name":"东方仙侠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1140&name=东方仙侠&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":259,"name":"奇幻仙侠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=259&name=奇幻仙侠&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":9,"name":"仙侠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=9&name=仙侠&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":373,"name":"西游衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=373&name=西游衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7551137135694791193","read_count":"7350","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1095471"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"6.2","serial_count":"437","tags":"东方仙侠,玄幻,奇幻仙侠,仙侠,穿越,西游衍生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/cd1d212d215280fee16e95954e5e908a~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779438989&x-signature=zysDUQhCxOCVc83XKX3di0XiBjo%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3923478275698231","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"77"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032316362819B5424CB47A80BC0675"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读3小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":1,"forwarded_cou
